format_schema.__comment: Specify column indexing (for ASCII), struct definition (for Binary), or leave empty if self-describing (e.g., HDF5).

field_mappings.__comment: Map format-specific fields to SAGE required fields. Use arrays for 3D vectors if split across columns.

synthetic_logic.Pointer_Logic: <Describe how pointers are handled or synthesized (e.g., Pointer Parity Map)>
synthetic_logic.__comment: Add any other logic required to generate missing SAGE fields (e.g., Mass_Approximations, FOF_Requirement).
topology_warnings: pointer_description: <Describe how pointers are formed and any risk of out-of-bounds or offsets>
id_uniqueness: <Describe if IDs are globally unique, snapshot-unique, or require explicit tracking>
